site.title: @zerocomputer | Nikita Sarychev
site.description: Full-Stack developer. Laravel, NestJS, Next.js, Vue, React.

hero.name: Nikita Sarychev
hero.bio: I handle the full development cycle of web applications — from design and frontend implementation to backend architecture and APIs.

about.title: About Me
about.text: Let's go back to 2014 — my first encounter with IT was trying to build simple games in Unity3D. I enjoyed creating something tangible. That spark is still alive today, though my projects have grown and become an integral part of my life.

items.description: Continued development of the flagship project "Dvor24" — a monolithic web application built with PHP (Laravel) and Vue 3 as the main client framework.
Worked in a team on projects for the Ministry of Education of the Orenburg region. Primarily served as a backend developer.
Delivered a wide variety of projects — from simple landing page design and markup to full web applications, APIs, and mobile app design.
